allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import streamlit; import pandas; from api_integration.providers import get_api_integration; from scoring_engine.engine import get_scoring_engine; print\('All imports OK'\)")

PowerShell($credDir = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.streamlit"; if \(-not \(Test-Path $credDir\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory $credDir }; Set-Content "$credDir\\credentials.toml" "[general]`nemail = `"`"" -Encoding utf8; Get-Content "$credDir\\credentials.toml")
PowerShell($env:PATH = "E:\\Git\\cmd;E:\\Git\\bin;" + $env:PATH; cd "e:\\Vessel_Rating_System - Copy - Copy"; git init)
PowerShell($env:PATH = "E:\\Git\\cmd;E:\\Git\\bin;" + $env:PATH; cd "e:\\Vessel_Rating_System - Copy - Copy"; git add .; git status --short | Select-Object -First 30)

PowerShell($env:PATH = "E:\\Git\\cmd;E:\\Git\\bin;" + $env:PATH; git config --global --add safe.directory 'E:/Vessel_Rating_System - Copy - Copy'; cd "e:\\Vessel_Rating_System - Copy - Copy"; git add .; git status --short | Select-Object -First 30)
